bullets: Catholic and Protestant believers in India facing false anti-conversion charges, arrest, and denial of bail after a private prayer gathering was disrupted by nationalist activists.
Eighteen house church leaders in China held without trial for over six months in inhumane conditions, with families separated and lengthy sentences threatened, according to ChinaAid.
Nigerian families who lost loved ones in the 2022 church massacre, survivors still bearing physical and emotional wounds, and communities seeking lasting justice and safety.
Christian and Jewish communities across France facing a dramatic rise in violence and physical assaults, including a 70% increase in attacks on Christians in 2025.
Civilians across Ukraine killed and wounded in Russian missile, bomb, and drone strikes, with residential areas, medical facilities, and evacuation vehicles destroyed.
People in Lebanon amid ongoing strikes, a rejected ceasefire framework, displacement, and women and girls unable to access healthcare during pregnancy and childbirth.
Civilians in Kuwait and Bahrain caught in Iranian missile and drone strikes on civilian infrastructure, with one person killed and dozens wounded.
Palestinians in Gaza, including women and children with disabilities, killed and displaced in airstrikes on residential neighborhoods and refugee areas.
Millions of civilians in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo trapped between escalating armed conflict and an active Ebola outbreak disrupting humanitarian access.
Foreign migrants and displaced families in South Africa fleeing deadly anti-immigration violence, with hundreds crossing borders and seeking emergency shelter.
Hundreds of families in Somalia displaced by political gunfire in the capital, with livelihoods lost and communities cut off from markets and basic movement.
Schoolchildren and teachers in north-eastern Nigeria amid ongoing abductions and the deep insecurity threatening education in conflict-affected communities.
Residents in Bolivia amid prolonged street protests, road blockades, economic hardship, and clashes between demonstrators and security forces.
Protesters and coastal communities in Albania facing forcible removal from protected wetlands threatened by large-scale development, and thousands taking to the streets in the capital.
Protesters and families in Kenya following deadly violence over a planned disease quarantine facility, with public health and safety concerns unresolved.
Migrants and refugees in Libya facing hostile protests and rising tensions near the UN refugee agency's offices.
Civilians in the Tigray region of Ethiopia excluded from national elections after years without federal representation following a devastating civil war.
Communities across West Africa and the Horn of Africa living under military rule, political instability, and ongoing civilian suffering.
Civilians near oil and military infrastructure in Russia caught in overnight Ukrainian air strikes.
Residents and families in the United Kingdom grieving and divided following deadly street violence and community unrest.
Hostages and residents in the United States shaken by a prolonged armed standoff at a public building, and communities processing trauma in its aftermath.
Survivors and families in Australia still processing the grief and trauma of a deadly attack on a Jewish community gathering.

Communities in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Uganda, and neighboring countries facing a rapidly spreading Ebola outbreak complicated by insecurity, misinformation, and a strain with no approved vaccine or treatment.
Kenyan communities divided and grieving after deadly protests over a foreign-built Ebola quarantine facility on home soil.
Cattle ranchers and rural communities in southern Texas confronting the first domestic outbreak of a flesh-eating livestock parasite in six decades.
Residents across Venezuela, Indonesia, and the Pacific island nation of Vanuatu in the aftermath of moderate earthquakes and ongoing seismic vulnerability.
Communities along the northern California coast repeatedly shaken by a series of offshore earthquakes within a 24-hour period.
